## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] If I changed the detector, I updated **both** `tremormesh/stalta.py` and
      `4_Firmware/node/node.ino`, plus the tests
- [ ] No generated artifacts committed (plots, build output, binaries)
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or interfaces changed
